summary: Serializes a parsed URL-like value into a URL string from its available components.
signature_intent: Accepts a structured URL representation and returns its string form.
behavior: Adds a scheme followed by a colon when a scheme is present.
Includes the authority delimiter before authority-related components.
Adds credentials followed by an at sign when credentials are present.
Appends the network location when present.
Adds a colon-prefixed port when a port is present.
edge_cases: A port without a network location is still colon-prefixed.
Credentials without a network location are still followed by an at sign.
With no components beyond the delimiter, the result is only the authority delimiter.
